calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alvin Norman.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Keri Crittenton, CSR #6914. Telephone: 415-551-0609. Email: kcrittenton@sftc.org.

Adam N. Barasch, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ally Financial, Inc.
Brian Keizer, Replevin Specialist for plaintiff Ally Financial Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Barach and Keizer appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Alvin Norman.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Clam & Delivery, Injunctive Relief and Indebtedness for Money was filed on September 27, 2017.
Substitute Service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Alvin Norman occurred on December 14, 2017, and was effectuated on December 25, 2017.
Default as to defendant Alvin Norman was entered on February 23, 2108.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 11, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Ally Financial Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Alvin Norman, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,813.16.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,458.68.
Attorney Fees - $400.00.
Costs - $503.25.

Total - $40,175.09.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
